diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,155 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, initApp, CreateHandler, getOther, Hono
+- Reads as: src/hono-index, src/types, src/hono-base, src/utils/cookie, src/helper/factory/index
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono handlers with multiple inputs/outputs.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, getRoutePath
+- Reads as: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helpers for getting matched routes and path information from handlers.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, SendOptions, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for creating upgrade handlers and managing WebSocket connections.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, setCookieSameSite, getCookies, getSignedCookies, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, deleteSignedCookie
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helpers for setting/getting cookies including signed cookies for secure storage.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients with custom fetch implementations.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime type
+- Reads as: src/context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment access for different execution runtimes.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug, raw
+- Reads as: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for dynamic CSS and class management in Hono.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, CssClassName, CssEscapedString
+- Reads as: None
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utility functions and types for the CSS helper.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetch, ProxyRequestError, HTTPException, FetchError, ProxyError
+- Reads as: src/http, src/http-exception
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTTP proxy handler for forwarding requests to external servers.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting and displaying router routes.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, html, escapeToBuffer, stringBufferToString
+- Reads as: src/utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML rendering helpers for escaped strings and raw content.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helpers for pre-rendering and plugin management.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: createStaticGeneration, createStaticDataRequest, handle404
+- Reads as: src/helper/ssg/middleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG (Static Site Generation) helper for static page generation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, normalizePath, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path utilities and route filtering.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/streaming/index
+- Safe summary: Streaming helpers for custom events and text streams.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming API for custom streaming responses.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: src/context, src/utils/html, src/helper/streaming/utils, src/helper/streaming/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming API implementation.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: src/context, src/context, src/helper/streaming/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Text content streaming helper with chunked transfer encoding.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: src/helper/acce
